response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience in senior and staff roles, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), with current role at re:cinq specifically involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly matching a key job requirement. Minor gaps in explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions are easily addressed given the demonstrated testing expertise and rapid technology adoption throughout career.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack development with multiple senior and staff-level roles, substantially exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Perfect primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with current Staff role including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Proven testing culture and software craftsmanship expertise (TDD, created testing frameworks), plus excellent communication demonstrated through multiple workshops and courses
concerns: Nest.js experience not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js and TypeScript background—framework expertise would require verification
Testing tool specifics show Jest and Selenium background but lack explicit Vitest and Playwright mentions, though testing fundamentals are strong
Career history shows some shorter role durations in earlier career (multiple 1-year positions), though recent tenure (3+ years at Optilyz, current Staff role) suggests stability

key_factors.factor: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned
